author: doll-agent
content: Add typed sibling methods of integers: integers_u8, integers_i8, integers_u16, integers_i16, integers_u32, integers_i32, integers_u64. Each via a typed_integers! macro that validates low < high, computes the range as i128 (fits any signed/unsigned 8/16/32/64 span), draws via next_u64_bounded, casts back. Existing integers (i64) is unchanged. 6 new tests cover u8 range, i8 with negatives, u16 mid-range, i32 over the full span, u64 over the full u64 range (no panic / overflow), and bad-range error paths.
